creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text: Using devel/git creates a chicken and egg problem and it comes with a huge amount of dependencies which not everyone wants to have on the system. gitup has no dependencies, but base and works. Not as fast as git, but super simple. I don't consider git as the first tool of choice due to its complexity. I worked on many issues with John Mehr in gitup, have been using it now for years, with very little pain.
